@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "open-policy-agent-opa-4277-configurable-command-flags-through-environment-variab",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "open-policy-agent-opa-: Configurable command flags through environment variables",
+    "description": "Configurable command flags through environment variables. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current open-policy-agent-opa- deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your open-policy-agent-opa- version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nhelm list -n open-policy-agent-opa- 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working open-policy-agent-opa- installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review open-policy-agent-opa- configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant open-policy-agent-opa- configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nkubectl get configmap -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-policy-agent-opa-\n```\n## What part of OPA would you like to see improved?\n\nI would like to avoid having to overwrite the container command line to customize  the execution for an environment."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Configurable command flags through environment variables",
+        "description": "As requested in issue 4277, this branch adds environment variable backups to command flags found in the cmd package.\n\n### Why the changes in this PR are needed?\n\nAs documented in #4277 there are certain situations where explicit command flag values don't make the most sense, and it instead makes more sense to set environment variables that set command flag values as a backup, if the flags themselves aren't explicitly set.\n\n### What are the changes in this PR?\n\nFor each command flag in the `cmd`\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nkubectl get events -n open-policy-agent-opa- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Configurable command flags through environment variables\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "As requested in issue 4277, this branch adds environment variable backups to command flags found in the cmd package.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
